subject: 1.07w crashing during particle picking
body:
Looks like this happens almost reproducibly when I drag a particle-picking 
circle (manual pick)

2/10/2020 12:53:38 PM:
System.IO.IOException: The requested operation cannot be performed on a 
file with a user-mapped section open.

   at System.IO.__Error.WinIOError(Int32 errorCode, String maybeFullPath)
   at System.IO.FileStream.Init(String path, FileMode mode, FileAccess 
access, Int32 rights, Boolean useRights, FileShare share, Int32 bufferSize, 
FileOptions options, SECURITY_ATTRIBUTES secAttrs, String msgPath, Boolean 
bFromProxy, Boolean useLongPath, Boolean checkHost)

access, FileShare share, Int32 bufferSize, FileOptions options, String 
msgPath, Boolean bFromProxy, Boolean useLongPath, Boolean checkHost)

Boolean checkHost)

encoding, Int32 bufferSize, Boolean checkHost)
   at System.IO.StreamWriter..ctor(String path, Boolean append)
   at System.IO.File.CreateText(String path)

inputReport)

access, Int32 rights, Boolean useRights, FileShare share, Int32 bufferSize,
